children.heading: Disclaimer
children.label: a Disclaimer
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to supersede or limit the authority of Federal, State or local agencies otherwise authorized by law to provide services to Indians.

children.heading: Duplication of services
children.label: b Duplication of services
children.text: The Secretary shall work with all appropriate Federal departments and agencies to avoid duplication of programs and services currently available to Indian tribes and landowners from other sources.
